overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a cowboy character walking through a historic city at night. The character traverses wet cobblestone streets illuminated by gas lamps, passing horse-drawn carriages and a tram before walking along covered sidewalks with vintage storefronts.

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a wet cobblestone street at night, flanked by historic two-story wooden buildings with wrought iron balconies. Gas lamps cast a warm glow on the scene. A horse rider gallops past on the right, and the character passes a wooden bench and large tree along the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic street intersection with tram tracks

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right side of the street
electric tram passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street as horse-drawn carriage and tram pass by

electric tram approaching and passing by on the tracks

entered.detail: metal tram tracks embedded in the cobblestone street surface

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an intersection with visible streetcar tracks. A horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right, followed by an electric tram traveling along the tracks. The historic buildings remain visible in the background as the character continues walking through the open street.

events.description: character steps from cobblestone street onto paved sidewalk under wooden awnings

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk past illuminated shop windows

entered.detail: green painted storefront with 'PENCE & Co CHINA GLASS' signage and display windows
storefront with 'V. DAWSON MILLINERY' signage for hats and gloves
overhanging wooden awning covering the sidewalk
parked wooden freight wagon on the street side
wooden shipping crate on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character transitions onto a covered sidewalk beneath wooden awnings, passing vintage storefronts including a china and glass shop and a millinery. The ground changes from cobblestone to concrete sidewalk, and the scene becomes more enclosed as the character walks past parked wagons and wooden crates.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a historic city at night, transitioning from an open, lamp-lit street to an enclosed commercial sidewalk. It begins with the character walking down wet cobblestones flanked by wooden buildings and wrought iron balconies, as a horse rider gallops past under the warm glow of gas lamps. As the character reaches an intersection, the scene opens up to reveal streetcar tracks where a horse-drawn carriage and an electric tram pass by. The camera then follows the character as they shift from the open road onto a covered sidewalk beneath wooden awnings, moving past vintage storefronts like a millinery and a china shop. Finally, the environment becomes more confined, with the ground changing to concrete as the character passes parked wagons and wooden crates.
